untranslatable_reason: The signal requires P/E ratio comparison (stock P/E vs S&P 500 P/E), which requires fundamental data not present in the allowed technical indicators list. P/E ratios are not among the ALLOWED INDICATORS (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Position, Returns, Bar Properties). Additionally, CANSLIM criteria validation cannot be expressed with technical indicators alone. These require access to fundamental data feeds and multi-factor screening logic outside the scope of this technical indicator rule engine.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally incompatible with a technical-indicator-only backtest engine. Would require: (1) Real-time P/E ratio data for both individual stocks and S&P 500 index, (2) CANSLIM screening module (earnings growth, relative strength, industry performance, market timing, etc.). Recommend implementing this signal in a fundamental data layer or multi-asset screening platform rather than a technical indicator backtest.
